case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC. VS. THE ARK OF REFUGE, et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC. SERVED MAY-29-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE ARK OF REFUGE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE ARK OF REFUGE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $4,922.17 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $351.08 INTEREST, $231.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,504.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THE ARK OF REFUGE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT THE ARK OF REFUGE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1 THRU 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-2013

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $231.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT THE ARK OF REFUGE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10
